case_title: CAL-STEAM INC et al VS. FERRARI PLUMBING INC A CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAL-STEAM INC FERGUSON ENTERPRISES INC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAL-STEAM INC FERGUSON ENTERPRISES INC SERVED MAY-17-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FERRARI PLUMBING INC A CORPORATION
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-30-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAL-STEAM INC FERGUSON ENTERPRISES INC AS TO DEFENDANT FERRARI PLUMBING INC A CORPORATION DOES 1 THROUGH XX INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-18-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-16-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-03-2009
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-18-2009 CONTINUED TO OCT-30-2009 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212, TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
